Direct Citation · Bibliographic Coupling · Co-citation

Co-citation Network

An edge means two articles are both cited by the same third article in the archive. Edge thickness reflects co-citation frequency.

Each node is an article. Node size reflects citation count. Drag nodes to rearrange; scroll to zoom.

1607 articles, 8988 edges. Only articles with at least one edge shown.

Based on Olsen, Bendtsen & van Leeuwen (2026). Citation data from OpenAlex.
